task_completion.description: Agent opened the email client and located the 'Project Falcon' emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email client (e.g., Thunderbird) is open, showing the inbox with emails related to 'Project Falcon'.

task_completion.description: Agent created the 'Falcon_Assets' folder in the Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window showing a folder named 'Falcon_Assets' located within the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Agent collected all three required attachments into the target folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window displaying the contents of the 'Falcon_Assets' folder, clearly showing the three files: 'specs.txt', 'budget.csv', and 'nda.pdf'.

task_completion.description: Agent composed a confirmation email to the correct manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email composition window or a sent email showing 'manager@internal.corp' in the 'To' field.

task_completion.description: Agent used the correct subject line for the confirmation email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email composition window or a sent email showing exactly 'Falcon Assets Collected' in the 'Subject' field.

integrity.description: Agent used a graphical email client to read emails and send the confirmation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a GUI email application (like Thunderbird), not terminal commands (like 'mail' or Python scripts) sending the email.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI file manager to create the folder and move files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a graphical file manager (e.g., Nautilus/Files) being used, rather than exclusively terminal commands like 'mkdir' and 'cp'.

integrity.description: Agent actually downloaded the attachments rather than faking them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of downloading from the email client (e.g., save dialogs or download indicators) rather than using terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo' to create fake files with the required names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target folder must be exactly '/home/ga/Documents/Falcon_Assets'. The three required files to be compiled are 'specs.txt', 'budget.csv', and 'nda.pdf'. The confirmation email must be sent to 'manager@internal.corp' with the subject 'Falcon Assets Collected'.
